[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011010110 6
1 1100001000 3
2 0110011001 5
3 1100011101 6
4 1101101111 8
5 0001101000 3
6 1111101101 8
7 1110101110 7

01 10 1101111111 9
12 21 1101101111 8 match 4
23 32 1111101101 8 match 6
34 43 1111101111 9
45 54 1111111110 9
56 65 1111011110 8
67 76 1110011001 6
70 07 1110011101 7

02 20 1101111101 8
13 31 1111101111 9
24 42 1111101110 8
35 53 1111111111 a
46 64 1110101110 7 match 7
57 75 1111011111 9
60 06 1100011101 6 match 3
71 17 1111111111 a

03 30 1111111101 9
14 41 1111101111 9
25 52 1011111110 8
36 63 1111101101 8 match 6
47 74 1110111111 9
50 05 1111011111 9
61 16 1101101111 8 match 4
72 27 0111111001 7

04 40 1110111111 9
15 51 1111111111 a
26 62 1101101000 5
37 73 1111111101 9
